check.action: gh api graphql -f query='mutation { resolveReviewThread(input: {threadId: "{{thread_id}}"}) { thread { isResolved } } }'
gh api graphql -f query='mutation { resolveReviewThread(input: {threadId: "{{thread_id}}"}) { thread { isResolved } } }'
Parse the issue URL from the gh output; extract {{issue_number}}.
gh api graphql -f query='mutation { resolveReviewThread(input: {threadId: "{{thread_id}}"}) { thread { isResolved } } }'

substep.title: Verify All Threads Resolved
substep.action: gh api graphql -f query='query { repository(owner:"{{owner}}",name:"{{repo}}") { pullRequest(number:{{pr_number}}) { reviewThreads(first:100) { nodes { isResolved } } } } }'

check.action: Halt with: "After respond-and-resolve, {{n}} threads remain unresolved. Inspect manually; do NOT proceed to re-review."
